name: Amped
timing: Play this before a Unit Activates.
effect: The Unit's Weapons gain +1 Damage for the Activation.

name: Blade Runner
timing: Play this card when a Unit Moves.
effect: Models in the Unit can extend their Movement by 2" and can bypass Obstacles.

name: Extras!
timing: Play this card when a Unit completes its Activation.
effect: Unmark all of its Combat Loads.

name: Juiced
timing: Play this when a Model suffers Damage.
effect: It will ignore all Damage taken.

name: Perimeter Defense
timing: Play this card when an Enemy Unit is Activated.

name: Phase Out
timing: Play this before a Unit Activates.
effect: Models in this Unit can be placed anywhere within 2" before their Activation begins.

name: Rewind
timing: Play this after Activating a Unit.
effect: The Player may immediately Activate another Unit and play a Battle Drill for free.

name: Personal Shielding
timing: Play this card when a Unit suffers Damage.
effect: For the duration of the Activation, Models in this Unit may roll 2 additional Armor Check D10.
